info.title: GymTrak API
info.description:
Gym management backend. Public API base: `https://api.gym.anantalabs.in/api/v1`. **Member / generic phone tokens:** `POST /auth/otp/send` → `POST /auth/otp/verify` (E.164 `phone`) returns `gymId` when resolvable. **Owner app (mobile):** `POST /auth/login` (phone) → `POST /auth/verify-otp` → registered users get `gym_id` + tokens; new phone → `tempToken`, then `POST /user/select-role` and `POST /gym` or `POST /gyms` with `Authorization: Bearer <tempToken>`. Temp tokens only work on those signup routes.

**Access JWT payload** (non-temp): includes optional **`gymId`** (default gym: owned gym, else first active trainer/staff/member membership). Issued on login and refresh. **`GET|PUT|POST /profile`** (unified owner/trainer profile) uses this claim only—no `gymId` query. **`/profile/me`*** routes still require **`?gymId=`** explicitly. See schema `JwtAccessTokenPayload`.

tags.name: Health & App
tags.description: Probes and mobile splash config

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Login, OTP, tokens

tags.name: Attendance
tags.description: Gym attendance under `/attendance`: mark present/absent, member check-in/out, daily/monthly logs, member lifetime stats, gym summary, block/unblock members, biometric device register/list/revoke. **`POST /attendance/biometric/check-in` is public** (gymId + deviceId + apiKey). Other routes use Bearer; RBAC `members:manage` where the Nest `PermissionsGuard` is applied (gym owner bypasses RBAC).

tags.name: Attendance QR
tags.description: QR attendance under `/attendance-qr`: member short-lived token, static gym QR for staff/kiosk, public verify-gym and check-in/scan (no JWT). Authenticated routes require Bearer (same global JWT as other app APIs).

tags.name: Owner signup
tags.description: Onboarding after OTP (Bearer: access or temp): `POST /user/select-role`, `POST /gym`. After setup: **`POST /gym/generate-qr`** (owner/super-admin, location + radius → `Gym.gymQrCode`). **`GET /gym/scan-qr`** is public (query **`gymId`** for gym details + `imageUrl`).

tags.name: Gyms
tags.description: Gym list and create

tags.name: Members
tags.description: Gym member list, **detail profile** (`GET /members/{memberId}`), **attendance** (`GET .../attendance/summary`, `GET .../attendance/history`; legacy `GET .../attendance`), create/update. Owner allowed; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

tags.name: Core
tags.description: Dashboard, **profile**. **Unified:** `GET|PUT|POST /profile` (camelCase `{ success, data }`, gym from JWT `gymId`). **Role-specific:** `GET /profile/me`, `PUT /profile/me/{member|owner|trainer}` with `?gymId=`. **Legacy owner:** `GET|PUT /profile/legacy` (no gym query). **Account:** `DELETE /profile`.

tags.name: Enquiries
tags.description: Lead and enquiry CRM; requires gym access and leads SaaS entitlement

tags.name: Expenses
tags.description: **POST body:** `gymId`, `bill_name`, `category`, `date`, `trainer_id`, `payment_mode`, `gst`, `amount`. **Expense JSON (list / get / create / update):** `id`, `gymId`, `bill_name`, `category`, `date`, `trainer_id`, `payment_mode`, `gst`, `amount`. `bill_name` ↔ `description` in DB; `gst` ↔ `gstPercent`. **DELETE** returns `{ "ok": true }`. **GET /expenses/monthly-summary** unchanged (aggregates).

tags.name: Plans
tags.description: Gym plan catalog and member plan assignment

tags.name: Subscriptions
tags.description: Member subscriptions and lifecycle actions

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Gym payment collection and analytics

tags.name: Invoices
tags.description: Subscription invoices

tags.name: Leaves
tags.description: Trainer leave management (`/leaves`). Permissions: `leave:create`, `leave:read`, `leave:update`, `leave:delete`, `leave:approve`, `leave:reject`. Owner/super-admin bypass RBAC. Trainers list only their leaves; staff with approve/reject/delete see the gym queue. `TRAINER_ANNUAL_LEAVE_DAYS` env (default 12) drives balance.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Gym shop catalog (`/products`). RBAC: `product:create`, `product:read`, `product:update`, `product:delete`. Owner/super-admin bypass on writes. Any active gym member may list/get (active products only unless `include_inactive=true` and caller manages catalog). Body fields use snake_case (`gym_id`, `discount_price`, `is_active`).

tags.name: Favorites
tags.description: User favorites (`/favorites`). Requires `gymId` or `gym_id` query. Any active gym member at that gym.

tags.name: Trainers
tags.description: Trainer management, profile, permissions, and credentials

tags.name: Workouts
tags.description: **Trainer API (preferred):** `GET|POST /trainers/workouts`, `GET|PATCH|DELETE /trainers/workouts/{workoutId}` (use `?gymId=` where documented), `GET|POST /trainers/workouts/exercises`, `PATCH|DELETE /trainers/workouts/exercises/{exerciseId}`. **Catalog metadata:** `GET /meta/all` (public). **Legacy (no `/trainers` prefix):** `/exercises`, `/workouts`, `/members/{memberId}/workouts`, `/workouts/{workoutId}`, sets and exercise-sets. All authenticated workout routes use `Authorization: Bearer` (and `?gymId=` or `X-Gym-Id` where the controller reads gym context).

tags.name: Diet
tags.description: Member scheduled meals (`/diet`) and per-gym food catalog (`/diet/food`). Requires `Authorization: Bearer` and `?gymId=`; staff must be allowed to manage the gym.

tags.name: Uploads
tags.description: Authenticated image upload endpoints

get.description: Public. Returns equipment (`label`, `value`, `icon`), muscles (`label`, `value`), and exercise types with `fields` arrays for logging UI (e.g. `REPS`, `KG`, `TIME`). Stored values match Prisma enums.
Same contract as `GET /trainers/workouts/exercises`.

post.description: Same contract as `POST /trainers/workouts/exercises`.

400.description: No fields to update or validation error

404.description: Exercise not found in this gym

delete.description: Same contract as `DELETE /trainers/workouts/exercises/{exerciseId}`. Hard delete; fails with 409 if referenced by a member workout.

404.description: Exercise not found in this gym

post.description: Same body as `POST /trainers/workouts` but **no** `gymId` query — member is resolved from `member_id`; caller must have access to that member’s gym (JWT / trainer rules).

get.description: Same response as `GET /trainers/workouts/{workoutId}`.

post.description: Sets `completed`, `ended_at`, and aggregates volume/sets from completed sets.

delete.description: Removes the exercise link from this plan (not the catalog exercise).

get.description: Returns `workout_id`, `title`, `date`, `exercise_count` for the member’s GymUser id.

post.summary: Add a set to a workout exercise

post.description: Body: `member_id` (GymUser id), `date` (YYYY-MM-DD), optional `time` (HH:mm), `status` `present` | `absent`. Gym owner allowed; staff need `members:manage`.
Explicit clock-in endpoint. Preferred one-endpoint flow: `POST /attendance/clock`. Legacy alias: `POST /attendance/check-in`.
Explicit clock-out endpoint. Preferred one-endpoint flow: `POST /attendance/clock`. Legacy alias: `POST /attendance/check-out`.
Single endpoint for both actions. If no record exists for the day, creates clock-in; if clocked-in and not clocked-out, performs clock-out. Legacy alias: `POST /attendance/punch`.

409.description: Already checked out for this day

post.description: **No Bearer.** Auto punch behavior: first scan clocks in, second scan clocks out for the same day. Preferred path: `POST /attendance/biometric/punch` (legacy alias: `/attendance/biometric/check-in`). Body: `gymId`, `deviceId`, `apiKey` from registration.

get.description: Path `memberUserId` is the member **User** id.

Returns one static signed QR token (plus base64 image) for the current user at this gym. Works for owner, staff, trainer, and member. **Punch via `/attendance-qr/punch` is allowed for member, trainer, and staff QR** (owner QR is rejected). Query: `gymId`.
Legacy alias of `GET /attendance-qr/my-qr`.

post.summary: Attendance clock punch with static user QR
post.description: Single punch API. For **member QR**, **trainer QR**, and **staff QR**: first scan clocks in, second scan clocks out for the same day. For **owner QR**: include `Authorization: Bearer <member/trainer/staff token>` to punch the logged-in user at that gym, or use `POST /attendance-qr/punch/me`. Body: `token` from `GET /attendance-qr/my-qr`.

400.description: Invalid token/payload, role mismatch, or owner QR used without logged-in context

post.summary: Attendance punch for logged-in user using gym QR
post.description: Bearer required. Logged-in member/trainer/staff can punch themselves using any valid gym QR token (including owner QR) from the same gym. Body: `token` from `GET /attendance-qr/my-qr`.

403.description: Logged-in user not eligible for punch at this gym

post.description: **Phone path:** send `phone` (+ optional `country_code`) — always sends OTP, returns `isRegistered`. **Password path:** `username` + `password` (trainer/owner app).
Generic OTP challenge. `purpose` must be `PHONE_LOGIN` or `PHONE_VERIFY`.

Issues `accessToken`, `refreshToken`, onboarding `session`, `user`, and `gymId` (first owned gym, else first trainer/staff/member gym, else `null`). Use `gymId` as `GET /dashboard?gymId=` or `X-Gym-Id` where required.
Registered user → `access_token`, `refresh_token`, `gym_id` (nullable), `app_role`, `user`. New phone → `tempToken` (short TTL) for signup routes only; `gym_id` is null.

gym_id.description: Default gym for API calls (owned gym preferred, else first trainer/staff/member gym)

post.description: Requires active trainer/staff membership (or super-admin). Trainer/staff must have at least one approved effective permission in a gym.

401.description: Invalid credentials or no approved permissions

200.description: Session payload (`session` + `user`; shape matches `AuthFullSessionResponse` without tokens)

post.description: Use Bearer **tempToken** (new user) or **access_token**. New owners should choose `gym_owner` before creating a gym.
Returns `access_token` + `refresh_token` when completed with a **temp** signup token.

200.description: Gym created (+ tokens if temp flow)

post.description: Gym **owner** or platform **super-admin**. Updates `address`, `latitude`, `longitude`, `gymRadius`, and stores the QR PNG as **`gymQrCode`** and **`imageUrl`** (same `data:image/png;base64,...` data URL). QR encodes base64 JSON `{ v, gymId, address, latitude, longitude, gymRadius }`.

imageUrl.description: PNG data URL for gym QR

qrContentBase64.description: Raw base64 payload embedded in the QR

get.description: **No Bearer.** Query **`gymId`**. Returns `{ success, data }` with gym details; **`data.imageUrl`** is the stored gym QR as a PNG **data URL** (`data:image/png;base64,...`), same as `data.gymQrCode`, or `null` if `POST /gym/generate-qr` was never run.

data.description: Gym row fields; PNG QR image

imageUrl.description: PNG data URL for gym QR image

post.description: Returns `access_token` + `refresh_token` when completed with a **temp** signup token.

get.description: **Gym owners:** use `mobileView=owner` for the owner home payload (no `dashboard:access` permission needed; optional `gymId` defaults to first gym). **Trainers/staff:** omit `mobileView`, pass `gymId` (or `X-Gym-Id`) and require `dashboard:access` plus the dashboard feature for that gym. Use `gym_id` from `POST /auth/verify-otp` when present.

Owner dashboard path. Owners get owned-gym payload. Active trainer/staff can also call this route when `gymId` is provided and receive their dashboard payload for that gym. `permissions.effective` includes both core RBAC keys and expanded UI keys (dashboard/client/subscription/payment/attendance/workout/diet/leads/plans/trainers/salary/expense/gym/leave/broadcast/qr/shop).
Searchable per-gym library (max 500). `search` matches substring on `name` (case-insensitive).

post.description: Adds a food template for the gym (optional `diet_food_id` on meal lines).

get.description: Scheduled meals for the gym (max 200). Optional `member_id` filters to one member’s GymUser id.

post.description: `repeat_days`: 0 = Monday … 6 = Sunday. `food_items` may use `diet_food_id` from this gym’s catalog or supply `name` with calories/quantity. Use `food_items` (not legacy `items`).

404.description: Member not found in this gym

patch.description: Partial update. When `food_items` is sent, it replaces all existing lines on the meal.

400.description: No fields to update or invalid `food_items`

get.description: Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

post.description: Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

get.description: Single-call staff view: `summary` matches list card fields (`id`, `name`, `phone`, `status`, `plan_name`, `expiry_date`, `profile_image`); `subscription` has `stats` and `current_subscription`; plus `gymUserId`, `lifecycleStatus`, membership fields, `user` (incl. `avatarUrl`), `contact`, `tabs` (relative URLs incl. `attendance` → summary API and `attendance_history` → history API), embedded **`attendance`** (lifetime check-ins, last visit, `links`). Bearer required; gym owner allowed; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Flat payload with `stats` and `current_subscription` only. Same auth as `GET /members/{memberId}`; prefer that route for full detail + summary + subscription together.

Calendar month dashboard in **UTC** for the selected `month`+`year` (1–12 / four-digit year). If omitted, uses the gym’s **IANA `timezone`** to pick the current calendar month. Returns day grid (`present`/`absent`), month + lifetime stats, punctuality-labelled `recent_logs`, and `months_overview` (last N distinct year/month buckets).
Paginated check-in log ordered by `attendedOn` desc. Optional `from` / `to` filter **UTC calendar days** on `attendedOn` (`YYYY-MM-DD`). Each item includes punctuality vs gym-local morning window.

**Deprecated** — prefer `GET .../attendance/summary` or `GET .../attendance/history`. If both `month` and `year` are set, response matches **summary**; otherwise matches **history** with `limit`/`offset`.
Requires Bearer auth and `gymId`. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

post.description: Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Compatibility helper for checking whether a legacy plan payload has the required fields.

post.summary: Create gym plan with owner-app payload
post.description: Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Compatibility endpoint that creates a member subscription from a gym plan. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

get.description: Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

patch.description: Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

put.summary: Update gym plan with owner-app payload
put.description: Compatibility update endpoint. Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

delete.description: Marks the plan inactive. Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

get.summary: List members enrolled in a plan
get.description: Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Requires Bearer auth and `gymId`. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

post.description: Creates a member subscription from owner-app style input. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

get.description: Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.

post.description: Creates a new subscription period. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Extends the existing end date. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Ends the current period and creates a new one. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Pauses access and extends the end date. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Resumes a frozen subscription. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Safe end-state action that marks a subscription as canceled instead of hard deleting it. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need `members:manage`.
Requires Bearer auth. Gym owner is allowed automatically; trainer/staff need either `members:manage` or `payments:access`.

get.description: Requires Bearer auth and `payments:access` for trainer/staff users. Gym owner is allowed automatically.

post.summary: Receive payment for a member subscription
post.description: Requires Bearer auth and `payments:access` for trainer/staff users. Gym owner is allowed automatically.

get.description: Requires Bearer auth and `payments:access` for trainer/staff users. Gym owner is allowed automatically.
Requires Bearer auth and `payments:access` for trainer/staff users. Gym owner is allowed automatically.
Requires Bearer auth, gym access, and leads SaaS entitlement. Optional `q` matches name, first/last name, phone, email, medium, interested-in, and address (case-insensitive where applicable).

post.description: Requires Bearer auth, gym access, and leads SaaS entitlement. Use `POST /uploads/images` then pass `photoUrl` for enquiry photos.

get.description: Returns total enquiries, converted count, and pending (status OPEN). Requires Bearer auth, gym access, and leads SaaS entitlement.

patch.description: Use `POST /enquiries/{enquiryId}/convert` to mark CONVERTED; other statuses may be set here.

put.description: Same behavior as PATCH for legacy clients.

post.description: Creates a gym member from the enquiry (phone/name/email overrides optional), optionally with `initialSubscription`. Sets enquiry status to CONVERTED.

200.description: Conversion result with new member detail payload

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: With filter=yearly: calendar year (UTC); defaults to current UTC year

get.description: Trainer: own balance (omit `trainerId`). Owner/staff: required `trainerId` (trainer `GymUser.id`).

post.description: Authenticated image upload for reusable app assets such as trainer photos. Send `multipart/form-data` with a `file` field.

400.description: Missing file or invalid image type

get.description: Requires Bearer auth and `admin:access` for trainer/staff users. Gym owner is allowed automatically.

post.description: Creates a trainer profile with salary, expertise, shifts, permissions, optional explicit credentials, and uploaded avatar URL.
Compatibility create endpoint that accepts requested UI labels such as `add_clients`, `show_dashboard`, `show_payment_in_details`, and explicit trainer credentials.

get.description: Returns scheduled/logged workouts for the gym. Omit `member_id` to include all members (up to 200).

404.description: member_id not found in this gym

post.description: Creates a `member_workout_plans` row with exercises and sets. Exercises must exist in the gym catalog (`exercises` table).

get.description: Full workout with nested exercises and sets.

patch.description: Updates `title` and/or `notes` on the plan (not individual sets).

404.description: Workout not found in this gym

delete.description: Deletes the plan and cascades to `workout_plan_exercises` / sets.

404.description: Workout not found in this gym

get.description: Filterable list of active exercises for the gym. `muscle` matches **primary** or **secondary**.

post.description: Persists enum values only (no labels). Secondary muscles are optional; duplicates and the primary muscle are ignored in secondary rows.

patch.description: Partial update. If `secondary_muscles` is sent, it replaces all secondary rows. Changing `primary_muscle` removes that value from secondaries when secondaries are not sent.

400.description: No fields to update or validation error

404.description: Exercise not found in this gym

delete.description: Hard delete. Secondary muscle rows cascade. Returns 409 if the exercise is still referenced by `workout_plan_exercises` (or another FK).

404.description: Exercise not found in this gym

get.description: Returns trainer profile, avatar, DOB, gender, experience, address, expertise, shifts, and permission flags.

delete.description: Only deactivates the trainer membership in the current gym; it does not delete the global user account.

post.description: Single trainer attendance API. First call clocks in, second call clocks out for the same day.
Legacy alias of `POST /trainers/{trainerId}/attendance/punch`.

patch.description: Updates trainer/staff permissions and returns boolean status by permission name (`dashboard`, `payments`, `member`, `admin`).

put.description: Accepts requested UI labels and maps them onto the existing backend permission flags.

get.summary: Current user at gym — edit-profile payload
get.description: Requires **`gymId` query** (distinct from unified `/profile`). Returns role-specific data: **owner** → `personal` + `gym`; **member** → name, avatar, DOB, gender, `gym`; **trainer** → same shape as trainer self detail (`tab`, `user`, `profile`, expertise, shifts, permissions) plus `firstName` / `lastName`. Phone is always read-only.

parameters.name: gymId
parameters.description: Active gym context. Typically matches the **`gymId` claim** in the access JWT after login/refresh.

403.description: Not a member of this gym or role not supported

put.description: Member app: name, photo (`avatarUrl` or `profile_image`), gender, DOB. **Phone is not accepted or changed.**

parameters.name: gymId
parameters.description: Target gym (same idea as JWT `gymId` for single-gym apps).

403.description: Not a member at this gym

put.description: Gym owner: personal name/photo plus gym name, address, GST (`gymGstNumber`), logo. **Phone is not updated.** Requires gym ownership (or super-admin).

parameters.name: gymId
parameters.description: Gym to update (must be owned by the user unless super-admin).

put.description: Trainer app: name (`fullName` or `firstName`+`lastName`), photo, DOB, gender, experience, address, salary (`salary` in major units or `salaryCents`), `salaryPeriod`, expertise, shifts. **Phone / email not accepted here.** Requires `trainer_shifts` gym feature when sending `shifts`.

parameters.name: gymId
parameters.description: Gym where the user is an active trainer.

403.description: Trainer feature disabled or not a trainer at gym

get.description: No `gymId`. Flat `name`, `email`, `phone`, `gym_name`, `profile_image`. Prefer **`GET /profile`** (unified; gym from JWT `gymId`).

put.description: Updates user `name` / `email` and sets **all** owned gyms’ logo from `profile_image` when provided.

get.description: `{ success, data }` with camelCase sections. **Gym context** comes from the **`gymId` claim on the access JWT** (issued at login / refresh), not from query params. If the claim is absent, the server may still resolve a default gym when validating the token—otherwise **400**. **gym_owner:** `gymDetails` set, `trainerDetails` null. **trainer:** `trainerDetails` set, `gymDetails` null. Members → 403.

put.description: `role` must match access at JWT `gymId`. Omit `trainerDetails` for owner and `gymDetails` for trainer. **GST:** when any `gymDetails` field is sent as `gym_owner`, `gstNumber` is required (15 chars). **Shifts:** if `trainerDetails.shifts` is sent, at least one shift with `dayOfWeek` 0–6 and `HH:mm` times. Images: pre-uploaded URLs.

400.description: Validation, role mismatch, or access token missing `gymId`

post.description: Same as PUT; gym from JWT `gymId` claim.

400.description: Validation, role mismatch, or access token missing `gymId`

delete.description: Archives owned gyms, deactivates gym memberships, marks user **DELETED**.

bearerAuth.description: Access token or short-lived temp signup token (temp only for POST /user/select-role, POST /gym, POST /gyms). **Normal access tokens** embed **`gymId`** (string | null): default gym for `GET|PUT|POST /profile`. Decode JWT to read claims; see **`JwtAccessTokenPayload`** schema. Legacy tokens without `gymId` may still work: validation resolves default gym from the database.

gymId.description: Default gym: owned gym first, else first active trainer/staff/member gym

JwtAccessTokenPayload.description: Decoded **access** JWT body (not the API response). Temp signup tokens use `isTemp: true` and omit `gymId`.

sub.description: User id (cuid). For temp tokens, implementation may use phone as `sub`—treat temp flows separately.

gymId.description: Default gym id embedded at token issue; used by `GET|PUT|POST /profile` unified routes.

isTemp.description: If true, only onboarding routes accept this token

MemberListSummary.description: Same shape as each element of `GET /members` → `members[]`

AttendancePunctuality.description: Check-in band vs gym-local morning window

MemberAttendanceSummaryResponse.description: Month dashboard: UTC month grid, stats, punctuality-labelled recent logs, per-month overview

gym_timezone.description: IANA timezone; default month uses now in this zone when month/year omitted

summary.description: Relative URL with gymId query for attendance summary

history.description: Relative URL with gymId query for attendance history

effective.description: Expanded effective permission map for trainer UI toggles.

LegacyUserProfile.description: Legacy owner summary: first gym’s branding

profile_image.description: Logo URL applied to all gyms owned by the user

gymGstNumber.description: 15 alphanumeric GSTIN; null or empty clears

ProfileGetMeResponse.description: Discriminated by `role`. **owner:** `personal`, `gym`. **member:** `gymUserId`, `fullName`, `avatarUrl`, `gender`, `dateOfBirth`, `ageYears`, `gym`. **trainer:** trainer detail (`tab`, `user`, `profile`, `expertise`, `shifts`, `permissions`) plus `firstName`, `lastName`. Phone is read-only on all variants.

TrainerLeaveStatus.description: Query filter uses Prisma enum values (uppercase).

trainerId.description: Required when owner/staff creates leave for a trainer (`GymUser.id`). Trainers omit (self).

UpdateLeaveRequest.description: At least one field required by validation in app.

remaining_balance.description: Days left this UTC calendar year

MemberStaffDetail.description: Member detail returned after create/convert (same shape as staff member GET).

sets.description: Total set count on the plan

member_id.description: Member GymUser id at this gym

UpdateTrainerWorkoutPlan.description: Partial — include only fields to change.

UpdateTrainerExercise.description: Partial body — include only fields to change.

fields.description: Logging field keys shown in UI, e.g. REPS, KG, TIME, +KG, -KM

diet_food_id.description: Optional catalog id from `GET /diet/food`; fills name/weight when omitted

food_items.description: When provided, replaces all food lines on the meal
